interpretation: Lead closure case with population, built-up and transport exposure translation; used as the primary workflow demonstration.

Strong-motion exposure is measurable in both population and built-up layers; this makes Po the strongest execution-ready European benchmark for EGMS follow-up, but not an independent EGMS validation by itself.
Supporting positive regional check; infrastructure translation remains incomplete.

strong_builtup_not_majority_fraction: Positive regional signal in the hierarchical ladder, but exposure translation is partial; retained as an EGMS transfer target rather than a completed local exposure replication.
Non-reproducing/specification control; useful for showing that the workflow does not force a positive result in every European delta.
